sourceNotes: Source-backed cleanup 2026-05-29: Visit Kavala supports Nea Iraklitsa sandy beaches, organized facilities, free parking, showers, changing rooms, cafe/bar and bus access. Elepod directly places Frog Beach Lounge at Paralia Rembis and lists organized-beach services, sunbeds, umbrellas, food and drinks. Nikana supports Remvi as the local beach passed before Psatha. No live sea-state claim was added.
